title: La ventego de Shakespeare
summaries: "La ventego de Shakespeare" by William Shakespeare is a play written in 1610–1611. After a violent storm wrecks a ship, the survivors find themselves on a remote island ruled by Prospero, a exiled magician, along with his daughter Miranda and two servants. Through magic and manipulation, Prospero orchestrates events to confront those who wronged him years ago. The play weaves together themes of revenge, forgiveness, betrayal, and family, blending tragic and comic elements with enchantment and spectacle. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
